Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, street-facing, fov 80
- main street road, 2-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: alley entrance mid-block; parking: parallel street parking both sides
- two-story brick commercial building at left block face, 2 stories, red brick, cast iron storefront columns, flat parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- single-story retail building at center block face, 1 story, brick, plate glass storefront, flat with low parapet roof, at sidewalk setback
- corner mixed-use building at right corner, 3 stories, brick, stone trim cornice, flat roof, at sidewalk setback
- utilities: overhead power and telephone lines, wooden utility poles every 50 feet
- landscape: concrete sidewalks, brick pavers at crosswalks, small planted tree pits
- immutable elements: cast iron storefront columns on left building, recessed corner entrance on right building, brick alley mid-block
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2015
Smartphone era fully arrived. A 2015 main street mid-revival — the video store replaced by a phone repair shop, third-wave coffee and a vape shop, smartphones in every hand.

PERIOD DETAILS
- RED ROBIN DINER with 'COFFEE $2.25' chalked on a menu board
- third-wave coffee shop with a minimalist logo and Edison bulbs visible inside
- yoga studio with frosted glass and a lowercase sans-serif logo
- window signs: 'CRAFT LATTE $4.50', 'SCREEN REPAIR FROM $49'
- string lights zigzagging over the sidewalk seating
- a modern bike-share style rack
Typography: minimalist flat sans-serif, simplified modern logos.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 15 people TOTAL: 6 near sidewalk (largest, foreground), 5 opposite sidewalk mid-block, 4 distant, far end of block. Grouped in pairs, threes, and singles; sidewalks busy, driving lanes clear.
- a dog leashed outside the coffee shop, its owner visible inside
- sidewalk diners at small cafe tables under string lights
- a dog walker with three dogs
Clothing: men in henley shirts, slim-fit plaid shirts; women in yoga pants and leggings, ankle boots. Fashion palette: coral, mint green, navy. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 6 period vehicles, all different:
- 2010-2016 Chevrolet Equinox — mid-size crossover — white
- 2007-2017 Jeep Wrangler — boxy off-roader, round headlights — silver
- 2011-2016 Hyundai Elantra — swoopy fluidic compact — pearl white
- 2009-2018 Ram 1500 — crosshair grille, refined — gray
- 2013-2019 Ford Fusion — Aston-Martin-style grille, sleek — blue
- 2014-2018 Chevrolet Silverado — squared modern grille — dark red
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2015.
All vehicles obey normal US right-hand traffic flow — parked parallel to the curb, each facing the same direction as its adjacent lane. Nothing sideways, diagonal, or against traffic.
PLACEMENT: three parked on the RIGHT side; the rest parked on the LEFT side. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead power lines common, undergrounding in new developments, fiber optic lines on poles

TREES
- oak tree at sidewalk left near corner: mature tree, full canopy
- maple tree at sidewalk center in front of retail: established tree, modest canopy
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — DSLR or smartphone camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: clean, minimal noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2007-2017 Jeep Wrangler — boxy off-roader, round headlights
